title: Skin Keybind Manager
description: Stores keybinds in unused skin pixels!
body:
Minecraft skins are 64x64 pixels - about ~1,000 of them are unused. This mod encodes your keybinds and stores them in these unused pixels, allowing you to easily transfer your keybinds between game instances at the click of a button! Supports classic and slim skins.

- Keybinds stored from mod XYZ are **persisted** even if (e.g.) new keybinds from a modpack **without mod XYZ** are uploaded
- Keybinds stored from mod XYZ are **overwritten** upon saving if the mod is installed and the keys **are bound**
- Keybinds stored from mod XYZ are **removed** upon saving if the mod is installed and the keys **aren't bound**

 

Adds button "Skin Keybind Manager" in Options->Controls.

Report issues [on Github](https://github.com/TheDuckMan64/Skin-Keybind-Manager).
